decisions.summary: SessionNode.type (not role) classifies session types. PRD draft erroneously used s.role === 'work'. Bucketing logic must use s.type === 'work' to detect work agent sessions.
issueCosts is Record<string, number> (not Map). The CommandDeck index.tsx builds it as a plain object from costData.issues.
feature.issueId is uppercase (e.g., PAN-1044). reviewStatusByIssueId keys are also uppercase. Direct lookup is safe without case normalization.

useDashboardStore selector for reviewStatusByIssueId must be called once at component top (const reviewStatusByIssueId = useDashboardStore(s => s.reviewStatusByIssueId)), then indexed per feature — React hooks cannot be called in loops.
projectsWithSessions is ProjectData[] (array), not a Map. In CommandDeck routing: projectsWithSessions.find(p => p.name === selectedProject)?.features ?? [] is the correct lookup.

Cost breakdown tooltip uses hover-popover pattern from FeatureItem.tsx (onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave/onFocus/onBlur) — not a click modal. This is the in-repo convention for inline popovers next to issue/feature rows.

IssueCostEntry in index.tsx is expanded to include byModel and byStage from /api/costs/by-issue (the endpoint already returns this data). CommandDeck builds issueCostDetails: Record<string, { byModel, byStage }> from costData.issues and passes it to ProjectOverview. No new API endpoints needed.

ProjectNode click split: ChevronRight wrapped in a span with its own onClick (e.stopPropagation + toggle). The outer button onClick calls onSelectProject and expands if collapsed. MessageSquarePlus already has e.stopPropagation — preserve it exactly.
bucketFeature exported from ProjectOverview.tsx for testability. Tests co-located in __tests__/ProjectOverview.test.tsx covering all 9 stage branches.

hazards.summary: ProjectNode is currently a single <button> that toggles expand. The split requires the ChevronRight to be wrapped in a separate <span onClick e.stopPropagation> inside the button. Do not use a nested <button> inside <button> (invalid HTML).
hazards.mitigation: Use a <span role='button' tabIndex=0> or plain <span onClick e.stopPropagation> for the chevron wrapper. The PRD narrative specifies plain <span>.

hazards.summary: issueCosts must be passed to ProjectOverview explicitly in the routing block. projectsWithSessions.find(...) returns undefined if the project name changed since last render — always use the ?. and ?? [] fallback.

The cost-breakdown-tooltip bead adds the CostBreakdownTooltip UI inside ProjectOverview.tsx. The issueCostDetails data is only wired in the commanddeck-routing bead. Until bead 6 is done, the tooltip degrades gracefully (badge shows, no hover). This is by design — the optional prop allows independent delivery.
hazards.mitigation: issueCostDetails is optional in ProjectOverviewProps. The tooltip checks for presence before rendering hover behavior.

hazards.summary: CostBreakdownTooltip reads from the issueCostDetails prop directly — no local fetch or useQuery. Tooltip data freshness depends on CommandDeck's 15s costData refetch interval. This is acceptable: cost data is not real-time.
hazards.mitigation: No action needed. Document in code comment.

hazards.summary: Friendly model name display should strip 'claude-' prefix and date suffixes (e.g. '-20250120') to avoid displaying raw API model IDs. Reference: friendlyModelName() in CostBreakdownModal.tsx uses replace('claude-', '').replace(/-20\d{6}$/, '').replace(/-/g, ' ') with title case.
hazards.mitigation: Copy the friendlyModelName() utility inline in ProjectOverview.tsx.

sessionHistory.note: Planning session started for PAN-1044: Command Deck: Project Overview Panel with pipeline swimlanes

Plan revised: added cost-breakdown-tooltip bead (hover popover for model/stage cost breakdown). Updated pipeline-swimlanes bead to explicitly include cost badge on stuck callout cards. Updated commanddeck-routing to expand IssueCostEntry with byModel/byStage and wire issueCostDetails to ProjectOverview. User requests: (1) cost of issue shown in summary, (2) hover over cost shows model/stage breakdown.

workspace-fran implemented CommandDeck selectedProject routing, issueCostDetails wiring, ProjectNode project-selection props, and CommandDeck coverage for project overview rendering. Commit 7e7c73a1d.

Restored full-suite stability by aligning stale model/skill fixtures with current sources and isolating agent-spawning tests from local Channels settings. Gates passed: npm run typecheck, npm run lint, npm test. Commit f2d67ee9c.

Fixed frontend-typecheck verification failure by passing issueCostDetails into PipelineSection so ProjectOverview cards can render cost breakdown data. Verified with npm --prefix ./src/dashboard/frontend exec tsc --noEmit.
